title: Weakened and Reluctant, Yemen’s Houthis Belatedly Enter War
summary_full: Analysts say their delay in supporting Iran is partly because their capabilities were severely degraded by the U.S.-Israeli campaign last year.
summary_public: Analysts say their delay in supporting Iran is partly because their capabilities were severely degraded by the U.S.-Israeli campaign last year.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: capabilities were severely degraded by the U.S.-Israeli campaign
